programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Sharon's smelly feet make her and her husband's lives a misery; however, strange smells, verrucae and hooked toes are all in a day's work for Marion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: At just 18 years old, Loren was involved in a catastrophic forklift accident; to save his life, doctors cut him in half; Sofia was an active 29-year-old when her heart went into end-stage failure; now she must be plugged-in to stay alive.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Following people whose bodies force them to navigate life differently, capturing defining moments with unfiltered access to their world.

programme.title: The Bad Foot Clinic
programme.desc: Podiatrist Marion treats Elaine who suffered childhood teasing due to her webbed feet; she hopes surgery can put an end to 65 years of misery.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Jennifer sits down for an exclusive interview with the cast of "Michael" -- Colman Domingo, Jaafar Jackson and Juliano Valdi -- to discuss the highly anticipated film; Jennifer welcomes Renee Watson and Maile Bellosi -- what began as a shared teaching career became an extraordinary act of love when Renee donated a kidney to her longtime friend Maile, giving her renewed life and hope for the future.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When Gloria's mother and sister visit, they bring traditions, baby names and family baggage; Phil helps the kids with their problems; Mitchell and Cameron try to correct Lily's bad habits.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When the lead in the school's production of "Phantom of the Opera" gets sick, Manny is willing to do anything to land the lead; Phil and Jay wind up in a golf-off with Mitch and Pepper; Gloria and Alex visit a psychic.

programme.sub-title: The Last Time I Saw My Mother, I Was 5 Years Old
programme.desc: A man searches for his birth mother, whose disappearance when he was 5 years old has haunted him for his entire life; a woman hoping to meet a member of her biological family faces certain realities about her true past.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.sub-title: If I'd Only Known About Her
programme.desc: A woman longs to meet her birth father, a man she credits for saving her life during a difficult childhood, even though they never met; a desperate man hopes Lisa can end a 57-year search for his infant sister, who he never stopped loving.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.sub-title: She Chose Another Person Over Her Child
programme.desc: Lisa helps a man locate his birth mother hoping to answer why she chose to marry a man who didn't want to raise him; a woman searches for the biological mother who abandoned her at a babysitter's house when she was three months old.
